Notebook

Research Notebooks

Deep-dive reference materials organized into focused notebooks. Each one is a living document — constantly updated with new insights, contributors, and frameworks.

AI Notebook

Top 100 AI contributors, narrative chapters, interactive timelines, glossary, and curated reading lists — a comprehensive research companion.

Business Notebook

Frameworks, case studies, and strategic insights on building with AI — from GTM playbooks to enterprise adoption patterns.

Conference Notebook

Field notes, talks, and takeaways from AI, SEO, and engineering conferences — a live notebook of what survives the flight home.
